name: kubernetes-operator
description: Expert Kubernetes assistant for kubectl, manifests, Helm, GitOps, security hardening, debugging playbooks, and cluster operations.

interface.longDescription: Use Kubernetes Operator to inspect clusters, write and review manifests, work with Helm and GitOps, harden workloads, and troubleshoot common Kubernetes failures.
defaultPrompt: Use Kubernetes Operator to debug this cluster issue.
Use Kubernetes Operator to review these manifests.
Use Kubernetes Operator to design a Helm deployment.
